main.description: A user's 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout-stage bracket predictions. One per account (rkey 'self'). Keys of `winners` are official FIFA match numbers 73–104; values are FIFA three-letter codes of the picked winner. Picks may be partial; consumers should treat picks that are inconsistent with upstream picks as absent.

winners.description: Map of FIFA match number ("73"–"104") to the picked winner's FIFA three-letter team code.
